meaning: adj.不谐和的,不调和的,刺耳的
examples: Very dissonant music. Is it major or minor?
And is it consonant music or dissonant music?
They chose to include all of these dissonant voices together.
The trick will be to get past the dissonant squabbling that passes for debate these days.
It was a dissonant, modern sound that I liked, but I couldn't detect anybody singing.
